title: Rental Applications
subtitle: Manage tenant rental applications
emptyHint: Try changing the search filters to see more results.

approve.successMessage: The application was approved and the contract was generated successfully.
approve.title: Approve Rental Application
approve.subtitle: Complete the contract terms to approve this application
approve.depositHint: If left empty, it will equal one month's rent
approve.graceDaysHint: Days before late fee is applied
approve.tenantRespPlaceholder: e.g. Maintain the property in good condition, pay utilities...
approve.ownerRespPlaceholder: e.g. Perform necessary repairs, keep property habitable...
approve.prohibitionsPlaceholder: e.g. No pets allowed, no smoking...
approve.coexistencePlaceholder: e.g. Respect quiet hours, no noise after 10pm...
approve.renewalTermsPlaceholder: e.g. Contract renews automatically if neither party gives 30 days notice...
approve.terminationTermsPlaceholder: e.g. Either party may terminate with 60 days notice...
approve.approvalMessageHint: This message will be visible to the tenant in their portal

reject.successMessage: The application was rejected and the tenant was notified.
reject.title: Reject Application
reject.subtitle: Provide a clear reason for rejection
reject.warningMessage: This action will notify the tenant that their application has been rejected. The message you write will be visible to the tenant.
reject.commonReasonsHint: Click a reason to use it as your message
reject.reason1: Does not meet minimum income requirements
reject.reason4: The property is no longer available
reject.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Explain to the tenant why their application has been rejected. Be clear and specific...
reject.rejectReasonHint: This message will be sent to the tenant along with the rejection notification
reject.tip1: Be specific about the reason for rejection
reject.tip3: If possible, offer suggestions for improvement
reject.requiredFeedback: Please provide a reason for the rejection
